questions.question: What famous 1952 genre-defining western starred Gary Cooper and Grace Kelly?
Name the popular 1958 epic historical novel by Leon Uris that portrayed the Jewish experience and the founding of Israel.
What singer/songwriter and activist was best known for her versions of protest songs 'We Shall Overcome,' and 'The Night They Drove Old Dixie Down'?
In 1961, what name was given to black and white activists who rode buses through the South to protest segregated waiting rooms and bathroom facilities?
In what 1964 movie was the following quote? 'Gentlemen, you can't fight in here! This is the War Room!'
